name: token-optimizer
description: Local-first context hygiene tooling for AI coding sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect context and generate local audit reports.
interface.longDescription: Token Optimizer is a local-first context hygiene tool for AI coding sessions. It starts with explicit, read-only inspection workflows and avoids background daemons, network calls, broad hooks, and raw transcript or tool-output capture by default. Audit reports are generated as local HTML files under .codex/token-optimizer/. Expert mode is available inside the generated report and reveals the raw audit JSON.
defaultPrompt: Health check: run Token Optimizer doctor for this project.
Generate report: create a local Token Optimizer audit report for this project.
Advanced hook: open the visual experimental Stop hook toggle.
